description: Style Note One of the world's largest denim-wear Brands lee definitely knows how to craft their jeggings. This Summer the brand presents a range of jeggings  that you will want to live in. Its blended fabric composition ensures a super-stretchy feel that is guaranteed to not stretch -out over time. tops, t-shirts, tunics..... Whatever you pair it, a lot of complements will definitely come your way. Product DetailsNavy blue denim jeggings, two mock scoop pockets in front with top stitch detail, embroidered branding on right , yoke and two patch pockets at the back with arquette embroidery, waistband with loops, zippered fly with button, embroidered branding at back waistbandMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitExtra low rise, slim and super skinny fitThe model( height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
